justification: All 4 files created with correct paths. All 8 ACs implemented with exact error codes. renewSubscription uses exactly 2_592_000_000 ms. Tests cover all 8 ACs with explicit names. acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs. files_changed lists all 4 files. However, the Subscription type uses 'cancellationDate' instead of the required 'cancelledAt' field name, which is a deviation from the spec. The field is present but misnamed.

observations.text: All 4 files created with correct paths and clear purpose descriptions
All 8 ACs implemented and tested — including edge cases AC5, AC7
renewSubscription uses exact 2_592_000_000 ms constant as required
18 tests with explicit AC-mapped names covering happy and error paths
acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 8 ACs to specific test names
Subscription type uses 'cancellationDate' instead of spec-required 'cancelledAt' — field naming deviation
Constructor injection of SubscriptionRepository confirmed via test mocking pattern
Defensive copies in repository prevent aliasing bugs — good engineering practice
